text:
is a term appearing in the movie Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time, this term is referring to the four Evangelions created from the Guf's Guardian (also called Adams): 

Evangelion Mark.09-A
Evangelion Mark.10
Evangelion Mark.11
Evangelion Mark.12

Trivia

The term Opfer means sacrifice in german.
